Author: siqns
Content:
# 📜 STAFF APPLICATIONS ARE CLOSED
**50xCreative will no longer be accepting new applicants for some time.**

As sad as it is, we will no longer be accepting anymore applications because we already have a number of staffs available, meaning the need to scale for more is no longer there. However, if the server were to be more popular and get a higher average player count, we will hire more. We apologize if you have spent your time and effort into applying, but rest assured that your results will be saved and all applicants will be reviewed. The application will still be open for those who are interested to become a future staff member here.

Kind regards,
siqns
-# Owner of 50xCreative

|| @PING | Applications ||

Author: egono
Content:
@PING | Applications 

The application will always be open, but when we evaluate the qualification is another question. The short answer - when we don't have active staff. That is around a month in the future or two. So good luck! (p. s. There were a lot of great applicants, but they haven't been on the server for a good while.)
